text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I asked Cafe to record my race, and shecaught this thing on camera...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
This just makes no logical sense. I'm<n>gonna delete
the video.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...There's no denying what's in the<n>picture,
though. Is deleting it just<n>running from the issue?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch! Do I delete it, or keep it? ...Keep<n>it?!
